pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J — nice to meet you. I'm hoping to win enough to finally afford a new car I’ve had my eye on; what brings you to the game?
I’m here to win $25,000 — my three‑year‑old needs surgery, we’ve exhausted our options, and I need to bring her the care she deserves.
I'm so sorry to hear that — that's heartbreaking. I'll be rooting for you; what's your daughter's name and when is the surgery?
Her name is Emma — surgery’s scheduled in about four weeks; thank you, I really appreciate the support.
I’m so sorry — I’ll be rooting for you and Emma and I’ll do my best in this game to help make that surgery possible; how are you holding up?
Thanks, J — I’m exhausted and scared but staying strong and focused for Emma; your support really means a lot.
I’m really glad you’re staying strong — I’ll be rooting for you and Emma, and if you need someone to talk to or any help before the surgery, I’m here.
Thank you so much, J — that means a lot. I’d really appreciate someone to talk to; could we sit together before the first round?
Of course — I’d be glad to sit with you before the first round. Let’s meet by the table in 10 minutes; we can talk or just sit quietly, whatever helps.
Thanks, J — I’ll meet you by the table in 10 minutes. I really appreciate you being here for Emma and me.
I'll be there in 10 minutes — hang in there; I'm glad to sit with you and Emma will be in my thoughts.
Thank you, J — that means more than I can say. See you at the table in 10; I really appreciate you being here for Emma and me.
Of course — see you at the table in 10. I’m here for you and Emma.
Thank you, J — that means so much. See you at the table in 10.
You're welcome — see you at the table in 10. I'm here for you and Emma.
Thank you, J — that means everything to Emma and me; see you at the table in 10.
I'll be there — see you soon. Thinking of you and Emma.
Thank you, J — that means everything to Emma and me; see you soon.
I'm really glad I can be here for you — see you soon; I’ll be thinking of you and Emma.
Thank you, J — your support means the world to Emma and me; see you at the table soon.
I'll be right there — thinking of you and Emma. Stay strong.
